_publications._publicationTitle: Immune profiling of NF1-associated tumors reveals histologic subtype distinctions and heterogeneity: implications for immunotherapy.

_contextSnippet: PD-L1 expression was high in the spontaneous model STS-26T, but only very slightly expressed in the NF1-associated model S462TY.
details: Successfully detected differential PD-L1 expression between cell lines - high expression in STS-26T and very slight expression in S462TY by flow cytometry
